title: Blog progress
content:
## Background

This blog is built using [Jekyll blog](https://jekyllrb.com) and hosted on Github.io. After running for about six months, we want to add tag functionality, mainly for differentiation and easier indexing.

## Adding Tags

To add tags, add the `Plug` module. Open `_config.yml`, find `plug`, and add the following two modules: `-jekyll-archives` and `-jekyll-sitemap`.

Then, in each file under the `_posts` directory, add `categories` and `tags`, separating multiple tags with spaces.

## Post Format

### Code

Notes:

* First letter lowercase

*`Objective-c` need replace to `objc`For code syntax.

* Some commonly used ones`Crash`, `堆栈信息`These types all use the same standard.`console` 即可.

> [^write-a-new-post] By default, all languages except plaintext, console, and terminal will display line numbers. When you want to hide the line number of a code block, add the class nolineno to it:

````markdown
```shell
echo 'No more line numbers!'
```
{: .nolineno }
````

更多[^code-table].
